description_long: This is a tall, slender street light with a single curved arm extending from the top of a cylindrical metal pole. The lamp head is streamlined and modern, with a slightly elongated, aerodynamic shape and a dark, opaque cover. Midway up the pole, there is a rectangular speed limit sign attached, displaying a speed limit of 30. The base of the pole is slightly wider, providing stability, and the entire structure is finished in a dark color, likely black or dark gray. The pole itself is plain, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features. This type of street light is commonly found along urban streets, providing illumination and traffic regulation.
description: A tall, modern street light with a curved arm and streamlined lamp head, featuring a speed limit sign attached to its plain, dark pole.
description_view_0: The street light is seen from the side, clearly showing the curved arm, lamp head, and the attached speed limit sign.
description_view_1: The street light is viewed from the front, with the pole appearing as a thin line and the lamp head visible at the top.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the back of the lamp head and the speed limit sign, with the pole and arm clearly visible.
description_view_3: The street light is seen from the rear, with the pole as a thin line and the lamp head facing away.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, elongated lamp head with a dark, opaque cover and no visible decorative elements.
